_comment: Tile and Map verbs. Tile reads/mutations take the Tile as their first arg (receiver "self"); Map queries route through TacticalManager.Get().GetMap(). Overloaded, out-param, list-returning and static map lookups are hand-written in Tactical/Tiles.cs, not here.

verbs.name: HasActor
verbs.summary: Whether an actor stands on the tile.

verbs.name: IsEmpty
verbs.summary: Whether the tile holds no entity.

verbs.name: HasStructure
verbs.summary: Whether the tile holds a structure.

verbs.name: IsValidMovementDestination
verbs.summary: Whether the tile is a valid destination for a move.

verbs.name: IsBlocked
verbs.summary: Whether the tile is blocked (impassable).

verbs.name: IsBlockingLineOfSight
verbs.summary: Whether the tile currently blocks line of sight.

verbs.name: IsIsolated
verbs.summary: Whether the tile is isolated (unreachable by movement).

verbs.name: IsTemporarilyOccupied
verbs.summary: Whether the tile is temporarily occupied (e.g. mid-move).

verbs.name: CanBeEntered
verbs.summary: Whether the tile can be entered at all.

verbs.name: CanBeEnteredBy
verbs.summary: Whether the given actor can enter the tile.

verbs.name: HasCover
verbs.summary: Whether the tile provides any cover.

verbs.name: HasHalfCover
verbs.summary: Whether the tile provides half cover.

verbs.name: HasHalfCoverInDir
verbs.summary: Whether the tile has half cover facing the given direction.

verbs.name: HasEnvironmentFeature
verbs.summary: Whether the tile carries an environment feature.

verbs.name: HasEffect
verbs.summary: Whether the tile carries any active tile effect.

verbs.name: Actor
verbs.summary: The actor on the tile, or null.

verbs.name: Entity
verbs.summary: The entity occupying the tile, or null.

verbs.name: X
verbs.summary: The tile's X grid coordinate.

verbs.name: Z
verbs.summary: The tile's Z grid coordinate.

verbs.name: Elevation
verbs.summary: The tile's elevation.

verbs.name: SurfaceType
verbs.summary: The tile's surface type.

verbs.name: Concealment
verbs.summary: The tile's concealment value.

verbs.name: InherentCover
verbs.summary: The tile's inherent cover type.

verbs.name: CoverMask
verbs.summary: The tile's per-direction cover bitmask.

verbs.name: VisibleMask
verbs.summary: The bitmask of factions that can currently see the tile.

verbs.name: IsVisibleToPlayer
verbs.summary: Whether the player can currently see the tile.

verbs.name: IsVisibleToFaction
verbs.summary: Whether the given faction can currently see the tile.

verbs.name: HasLineOfSightTo
verbs.summary: Whether the tile has line of sight to another tile under the given flags.

verbs.name: IsDirectNeighbor
verbs.summary: Whether the other tile is a direct (adjacent) neighbour.

verbs.name: DirectionTo
verbs.summary: The direction from this tile to another.

verbs.name: ManhattanDistanceTo
verbs.summary: The Manhattan distance from this tile to another.

verbs.name: DiagonalManhattanDistanceTo
verbs.summary: The diagonal Manhattan distance from this tile to another.

verbs.name: HasNextTile
verbs.summary: Whether a tile exists in the given direction.

verbs.name: SetConcealment
verbs.summary: Set the tile's concealment value.

verbs.name: SetSurfaceType
verbs.summary: Set the tile's surface type.

verbs.name: SetElevation
verbs.summary: Set the tile's elevation.

verbs.name: SetBlocked
verbs.summary: Set whether the tile is blocked (impassable).

verbs.name: SetInherentCover
verbs.summary: Set the tile's inherent cover type.

verbs.name: BlockLineOfSight
verbs.summary: Push a line-of-sight block onto the tile.

verbs.name: UnblockLineOfSight
verbs.summary: Pop a line-of-sight block off the tile.

verbs.name: AddVisibility
verbs.summary: Mark the tile as visible to the given faction.

verbs.name: RemoveVisibility
verbs.summary: Clear the tile's visibility for the given faction.

verbs.name: TileAtPos
verbs.summary: The tile under a world-space position.

verbs.name: SurfaceTypeAtPos
verbs.summary: The surface type under a world-space position.

verbs.name: CenterWorldPos
verbs.summary: The world-space centre of the map.

verbs.name: TerrainHeight
verbs.summary: The map's terrain height.

verbs.name: Slope
verbs.summary: The terrain slope at a world-space position.

verbs.name: MapIsReady
verbs.summary: Whether the tactical map has finished generating.

verbs.name: MapUsesFogOfWar
verbs.summary: Whether the map is using fog of war.

verbs.name: MapSizeX
verbs.summary: The map's tile count along X.

verbs.name: MapSizeZ
verbs.summary: The map's tile count along Z.

verbs.name: IsValidTile
verbs.summary: Whether the given grid coordinate is a valid tile.

verbs.name: IsValidPosition
verbs.summary: Whether the given world-space position lies on the map.
